summary: Iteration 32: Dashboard Fleet Filter Dropdowns - All 16 test cases passed (100%). Verified 4 filter dropdowns (Size, Type, Manufacturer, Storage), individual filtering, combined filtering, Clear Filters button, fleet tab integration, and fleet card role/SCU display.
passed_tests: Dashboard has 4 filter dropdowns: Size, Type, Manufacturer, Storage with correct data-testids
Size dropdown populated with actual fleet sizes: Small, Medium, Large, Capital
Type dropdown populated with actual fleet roles: Interdiction, Light Fighter, Transport, Light Freight, Heavy Gunship, Heavy Salvage, etc.
Manufacturer dropdown populated with: Aegis Dynamics, Drake Interplanetary, Anvil Aerospace, MISC, RSI
Storage dropdown has 3 options: All, Has Cargo, No Cargo
Size: Small filter correctly shows 4 ships (Avenger Stalker, Avenger Titan, Eclipse, Gladius)
Size: Medium filter correctly shows 2 ships (Cutlass Black, Freelancer)
Size: Large filter correctly shows 4 ships (Carrack, Caterpillar, Constellation Andromeda, Hammerhead)
Size: Capital filter correctly shows 1 ship (Reclaimer)
Type: Interdiction filter correctly shows Avenger Stalker
Type: Light Fighter filter correctly shows Gladius
Type: Transport filter correctly shows Caterpillar
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics filter correctly shows 6 ships
Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary filter correctly shows 2 ships
Storage: Has Cargo filter correctly shows 9 ships with cargo > 0
Storage: No Cargo filter correctly shows 3 ships (Eclipse, Gladius, Hornet F7C)
Combined filters work: Small + Aegis = 4 ships, Medium + Drake = 1 ship
Clear Filters button appears when any filter is active
Clear Filters button resets all 4 filters to 'all' and disappears
Fleet filter tabs (All/Ships/Land) work alongside category filters
Fleet cards display role text (e.g., 'Interdiction', 'Light Freight') after manufacturer
Fleet cards display SCU value (e.g., '12 SCU', '456 SCU') for ships with cargo
Dashboard stats, quick actions, manufacturer sidebar, loadouts section unaffected by filter changes
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console shows hydration warning about span inside select/option - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing user fleet (12 ships)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 verified Dashboard filter dropdowns feature. All 4 dropdowns (Size, Type, Manufacturer, Storage) dynamically populated from user fleet data. Filters work individually and in combination. Clear Filters button appears/hides correctly. Fleet tabs (All/Ships/Land) compatible with category filters. Fleet cards show role and SCU inline. data-testids: filter-size, filter-type, filter-manufacturer, filter-cargo, clear-filters-btn, fleet-filter-all/ships/land.
